recommendations.title: Goodnight Mommy
recommendations.overview: In the heat of the summer lays a lonesome house in the countryside where nine year old twin brothers await their mother’s return.  When she comes home, bandaged after cosmetic surgery, nothing is like before and the children start to doubt whether th

recommendations.title: Day Shift
recommendations.overview: An LA vampire hunter has a week to come up with the cash to pay for his kid's tuition and braces. Trying to make a living these days just might kill him.

recommendations.title: Sinister 2
recommendations.overview: A young mother and her twin sons move into a rural house that's marked for death.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn IV: The Gathering
recommendations.overview: A bright young medical student must solve the frightening mystery that plagues the children of a small Midwestern town.

recommendations.title: Abandoned
recommendations.overview: After a young couple moves into a remote farmhouse with their infant son, the woman's struggles with postpartum psychosis begin to intensify... as the house reveals secrets of its own.

recommendations.title: Loft
recommendations.overview: Five close friends, all of them married, share a loft to meet their mistresses. One day they find the body of a young woman in the loft. Since there are only five keys to the loft, the five men begin to suspect each other of murder.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: Umma
recommendations.overview: Amanda and her daughter live a quiet life on an American farm, but when the remains of her estranged mother arrive from Korea, Amanda becomes haunted by the fear of turning into her own mother.

recommendations.title: Bloody Hell
recommendations.overview: A man with a mysterious past flees the country to escape his own personal hell... only to arrive somewhere much worse. In an effort to survive this new horror, he turns to his personified conscience.
